calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-29-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-29-2026 Continued To Jul-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; - Matter not reported

Plaintiff JP Morgan Chase Bank, N.A. is present represented by Roger Jackson, Esq.
Defendant Richard Junz is not prsent.

Ms. Jackson stated to the court he did not have any paper courtesy copies or a proposed judgment to show the court this day. He is requesting a continuance to be able to provide copies.

This matter is continued to July 17, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to give Mr. Jackson oppertunity to provide copies.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2026 Set For Trial On Jun-29-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
